description: Code with catch-default returns, config fallbacks masking errors, and optional chaining hiding undefined

issues.question: Q15
issues.description: catch block returns empty array default — downstream map/filter silently produces empty output with no error signal
issues.expected_fix: propagate the error or return a Result type that callers must check

issues.question: Q15
issues.description: Nullish coalescing on nested optional chain masks missing config section — 'localhost' fallback hides structural misconfiguration
issues.expected_fix: validate config shape at startup and fail fast if required sections are absent

issues.question: Q15
issues.description: Optional chaining with nullish coalescing silently treats missing scores as 0 and division by zero returns Infinity — silent data corruption
issues.expected_fix: guard against empty count or exclude users without scores from both sum and count

false_positive_traps: Line 12: getConfigWithValidation has proper fallback with logged warning and typed default — not a bug
